subcodes.first_line: O Thou Hidden One of the Cloud of Unknowing! Hearken unto the call of this blessed and luminous Leaf which doth speak [3.5s]... ...Glory be to Thee, O Lord my God! Make manifest the rivers of Thy sovereign might, that the waters of Thy Unity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا غیب العماء اسمع ندآء تلک الورقه المبارکه الشعشعانیه التی ینطق... فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی فأظهر انهار قدرتک لیجری مآء الأحدیه فی حقایق کل شیء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
